scene_description:
**Foreground to Background Description:**  

- **Road Surface & Markings (Center Foreground to Background):**  
  A two-lane asphalt road occupies the center of the image. The center line is a **yellow dashed line** (dashed in the foreground, transitioning to solid further down the road). White solid edge lines run along both sides of the road, separating it from the grassy shoulders. The asphalt surface appears smooth and slightly damp. The road curves gently to the right in the distance.  

- **Left Foreground (Left of Road):**  
  A **grassy shoulder** with a mix of green and brown vegetation borders the road. A **rectangular, blank white sign** with a gray frame is mounted on two gray metal posts. The sign face has no visible text, symbols, or pictograms.  

- **Left Midground to Background (Left of Road):**  
  Dense vegetation lines the left side of the road, consisting of **tall, leafless deciduous trees** (with thin, light-colored trunks) and scattered **dark green coniferous trees** (tall, needle-covered). The terrain is flat to slightly rolling, with no visible buildings or infrastructure.  

- **Right Foreground to Background (Right of Road):**  
  A **grassy shoulder** with similar green-brown vegetation borders the right side of the road. Beyond this, dense **dark green coniferous trees** (tall, needle-covered) dominate, interspersed with **tall, leafless deciduous trees** (thin trunks, no leaves). The vegetation is dense and continuous.  

- **Background (Center to Distant Horizon):**  
  The road extends into the distance, curving slightly right. In the far background, **low-lying hills or mountains** are visible beneath a **thick layer of gray clouds** (overcast sky, no direct sunlight). The clouds cover the entire sky.  

- **Absent Elements (No Visible Objects):**  
  No vehicles, utility poles, bollards, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, guardrails, fences, buildings, or visible text on signs. The road is empty.  

---  
**Category-Specific Details (Only What Is Visible):**  
- **TEXT & SIGNS:** One blank white rectangular sign (left mid-foreground); no text, symbols, or pictograms.  
- **INFRASTRUCTURE:** No utility poles, bollards, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, guardrails, or fences.  
- **VEHICLES & PLATES:** No vehicles present.  
- **ROAD SURFACE & MARKINGS:** Asphalt road; yellow dashed center line (dashed in foreground), white solid edge lines; flat/rolling terrain; no visible curbs.  
- **BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE:** No buildings visible.  
- **VEGETATION & TERRAIN:** Mixed deciduous (leafless, thin trunks) and coniferous (dark green, needle-covered) trees; dense vegetation on both sides; flat to slightly rolling terrain; overcast sky.

details.name: yellow dashed line
details.reason: Yellow center lines are characteristic of certain road systems, such as those in North America or parts of South America.
details.focused_description: The yellow dashed line consists of long, straight yellow segments separated by gaps, painted on the asphalt road. The line is bright yellow in color, with a smooth, even application. The segments are parallel to the direction of the road, and the gaps between segments are consistent. The material is road paint, appearing intact and undamaged in the visible portion. No text is present on the line.
